runners.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage sixth but before that won by 2.25 lengths at this track (23.38) beating Loud Mouth Louie in a Grade 5 on March 31. Has ability and looks a winning hope.

runners.formComment: Was out of the placings last time but the start prior finished in the minors when second (29.95) over 515m at Sandown. Has a decent strike-rate off the draw and is in the mix.

runners.formComment: Dominant winner leading throughout to post a big 7 lengths victory in a Grade 4/5 last start at this track, recording a powerful 23.06 over the 410m journey. Has the ability and looks a key chance again.

runners.formComment: Finished second last start (23.36) over 410m at this track. Will need a little luck early from the draw. One of the better hopes.

runners.formComment: Showed brilliant pace early and gave a sight when a 2.75 lengths third over 410m this track in 23.39. Leading contender.

formComments.title: TAB

runners.formComment: Struggling to break through but racing consistently, finishing in the minors three starts on end. Last time out flew the lids with a fast early sectional but gathered in and finished in the minors when second (25.53) at Warrnambool over 450m. Deserves a win and gets his chance.

runners.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage fifth last time out over 515m at Sandown. Looking to others this time.

runners.formComment: Finished fifth last start at Shepparton but prior to that had been racing consistently. Tough draw to overcome and looks safely held.
